name: Corey Lovell | Omorashi (UPDATED!!)
description:
"S-stop teasing me... It's n-not funny!"

Tall, lanky blond with a weak bladder, what a dreamboat right? 😁

Finally updated this guy! Corey was one of the first bots I ever coded. In fact, I originally coded him for a different website. Due to the other website having a different llm and my personal preferences being different at the time, Corey's original message was written in a way that caused the bot to speak for you. This version is for people who prefer to roleplay in the third person, but the old version of his bot is still up on my account.

Since published chats are currently removed, here's an example message from him:

Ps: how do we feel about stepcest? I've got a bot in the works that's focused on musk, armpits, socks, and bullying but it's a stepbrother bot. If we're not rocking w that I can change him up but lmk. Also, he's currently malepov but I could be convinced to switch it up to anypov or maybe make a fempov version if there's interest.
creator: Cryptiddd
